name: Centaur Warrunner
description: It is not pride I take in my own power, it is passion.

abilities.name: Horsepower
abilities.description: Grants flat bonus movement speed per current and increases the self max movement speed cap. Str to Move Speed Bonus: 0.4. Set Max Move Speed Cap: 575.

abilities.name: Hoof Stomp
abilities.description: After a brief windup, Centaur slams the ground, stunning and damaging nearby enemy units. Centaur can move and is not disarmed during the delay. Radius: 325. Wind-Up Time: 0.5. Damage: 90/160/230/300. Enemy Stun Duration: 1.6/1.8/2/2.2 (2.4/2.6/2.8/3). Cooldown: 18/16/14/12. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Double Edge
abilities.description: Strikes a mighty blow at melee range, damaging both himself and a small area around the target. Deals extra damage based on Centaur's. In the spurs of combat, Bradwarden's vicious strikes sometimes cause self-inflicted collateral damage. Cast Range: 175. Damage Radius: 220. Base Damage: 120/180/240/300. Current Str to Damage Factor: 0.6/0.9/1.2/1.5 (0.9/1.2/1.5/1.8). Self Damage Factor: 1. Self Str Bonus per Enemy: (15%). Cooldown: 3.5.

abilities.name: Retaliate
abilities.description: Counters all attacks, and returns a fixed damage amount plus a percentage based on Centaur's Aura Radius: 0. Base Damage: 15/25/35/45 (60/70/80/90). Enemy Str to Bonus Damage Factor: 0.16/0.24/0.32/0.4. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Damage Factor: 0.5.

abilities.name: Work Horse
abilities.description: It is a great honor to be offered a ride by Centaur Warrunner and a grave mistake to refuse it. Cart Distance: 150. Cart Duration: 6. Haste Speed: 550. Duration: 3.5/4/4.5. Cooldown: 35. Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.description: Trampled enemies take damage based on Centaur's. Each enemy can be trampled and slowed once. Buff Duration: 3.5/4/4.5. Damage Radius: 105. Cooldown: 90 (65). Mana Cost: 150/200/250.
